description: Historical small-business scenarios. Validate rules.json before agents rely on one-shot reasoning.

examples.task: Draft reply to angry customer email about late delivery
examples.why: Messy thread, customer stakes, need words not automation. Human edits tone and remedy before send.
examples.operator_lens: Use mf-tpl-001 framework after draft; never auto-send.

examples.task: Summarize messy voice memos into weekly owner brief
examples.why: Internal draft, human checks facts. Not worth API pipeline at low volume.
examples.operator_lens: Save final brief as template section when sections stabilize.

examples.task: Send same-day ack when web form submitted
examples.why: Same shape every time: thank you, what happens next, timeline. AI fills name and SKU only.
examples.operator_lens: Lock ack text once; spot-check 10 sends then consider slot-fill API.

examples.task: Brainstorm social post angles for shop promo
examples.why: Creative brainstorm with human picking one voice-aligned post.
examples.operator_lens: Paste brand do/do-not list into prompt every time.

examples.task: Tag bank CSV rows for accountant categories nightly
examples.why: Structured rows, no judgment per row, daily volume. Pipeline with error queue for odd rows.
examples.operator_lens: Human reviews exceptions bucket weekly; not every row.

examples.task: Write hiring rejection email after interview
examples.why: Person on the other end, reputation on the line. Human writes or heavily personalizes.
examples.operator_lens: AI outline in private notes only if helpful.

examples.task: Let AI answer the main phone line during hours
examples.why: Live judgment every call. Voicemail and callback beats bot for small shop trust.
examples.operator_lens: Template for hours and callback promise only.

examples.task: Pull new leads from inbox labels into Sheet each night
examples.why: Structured extract job. Script or API, not chat UI each night.
examples.operator_lens: mf-tool-001 if tempted to buy CRM before script exists.

examples.task: Research competitor pricing and draft custom proposal for one prospect
examples.why: Multi-step: gather sources, compare, draft sections. One prompt will miss or invent.
examples.operator_lens: Human approves numbers before PDF goes out.

examples.task: Not sure if we should AI triage support emails
examples.why: No count of emails, no failure cost logged. Count and classify 30 days first.
examples.operator_lens: Then re-run: likely llm_assist for drafts, not auto-triage.

examples.task: Decide discount for repeat client asking for custom bundle
examples.why: Money decision. AI can list options; owner commits margin.
examples.operator_lens: Spreadsheet scenario math OK; AI does not send quote.

examples.task: Remind myself to export sales CSV for accountant
examples.why: Four times a year. Calendar alert beats any model.
examples.operator_lens: mf-tool-001 if someone suggests building an app for this.
